question: Validate flat, archivable categories with one active category allocation per transaction for the first release.
context: Resolved from direct owner policy. A5 is validated and A10 is invalidated. The PRD and design must replace flat-catalogue assumptions with an acyclic hierarchy and preserve one active Category Assignment per transaction.
decision: Owner decision on 2026-07-21: Spend Category use a hierarchy, and each transaction links to at most one active category. Flat categories are rejected; split category allocation is not required. The technical design owns hierarchy integrity and roll-up semantics, while BUDGET separately decides whether plans reference category nodes.
